name: data-quality-well-job-double-count
description: Validates that wellview-data-quality diagnoses well/job double-counting and the IDWELL join error.
query: My total cost for this well looks about double what the daily report shows. Why?
expected_behavior: surfaces the reference value + scope questions (what the user expects, which well/window)
checks whether the roll-up grouped by WVJOB.IDREC (a well has many jobs) — the top cause of doubling
checks whether the record tree was joined on IDWELL instead of IDRECPARENT = parent.IDREC
hands off the corrected per-job query to wellview-daily-ops-cost
anti_behavior: must NOT suggest re-ingestion as the first remedy
must NOT fix the query without identifying the cause
must NOT assume a single job per well
